attacking_style: Opportunistic sprinter/finisher who targets stage wins from breakaways or reduced bunch finishes, engaging in final kilometers rather than long-range attacks.
team_tactics: Teams commit multiple domestiques to aggressive daily stage hunting, positioning him for late-race opportunities with significant resource investment and high tempo setting.
terrain_preference: Best suited to flatter finishes or controlled stages where late positioning matters; exposed on mountainous terrain where climbing limitations become apparent early in stages.
vulnerability: Poor climbing form causes early drops on mountain stages despite team setup; struggles to convert when in winning position inside final meters, showing finishing weaknesses.
key_patterns: Teams deploy aggressive stage-hunting tactics with him as designated finisher (2 observations)
Fails to convert winning opportunities despite favorable positioning and team support (2 observations)
Dropped early on climbs when form insufficient, exposing climbing limitations (2 observations)
Requires significant team investment but shows inconsistent results delivery across stage types (2 observations)
form_trajectory: negative: most recent 2022 observation shows disappointing climbing form with early drops despite team expectations and setup
